title: 100 Madison Cross Back Chairs - Mark II - Bundle
features: What's better than one of our new Mark II Madison Cross Back Chairs?
This bundle takes care of all the shopping and buying for you in just one click.

Party rental companies and wedding venue owners looking to liven up their outdated inventory should take notice, as well as anybody interested in a rustic and elegant seating option that the Madison Cross Back Series has to offer.
As with all of our bundles, Free shipping is included as well as an option to purchase cross back chair cushions!
